meta.title: tendersbay — Win your next tender in Europe
meta.description: A team of AI agents that find, prepare and win European public tenders for SMEs.

hero.subtitle: tendersbay is a team of AI agents that find the right tender across Europe, handle the paperwork for you, and guide you all the way to winning.

items.title: Scattered across 27 countries
items.body: The right opportunities are spread across dozens of national portals, in different languages and formats.

items.title: Heavy document bureaucracy
items.body: Requirements, certificates and deadlines — a documentary maze that's easy to get wrong.

items.title: No dedicated bids team
items.body: SMEs have no procurement office — winning takes time and expertise they don't have.

agents.title: An AI agent team that works for you

items.title: Find
items.body: The agents find the right tender across Europe, tailored to your business.

items.title: Prepare
items.body: They handle the document bureaucracy for you: requirements, certificates, deadlines.

items.title: Win
items.body: They guide you all the way to the bid, for the best shot at winning.

audience.title: Built for SMEs and entrepreneurs
audience.body: For those who want to compete across borders without a dedicated bids office. tendersbay gives you the same firepower as the big players.

vision.title: European tenders, open to everyone
vision.body: Every year hundreds of billions move through European public procurement, yet it stays out of reach for those without the time, the language, or the expertise. tendersbay uses AI agents to change that — and give every SME a real shot.

footer.tagline: Europe's tenders, won by a team of AI agents.
